description: Use this API to read Geoelectric Efield Grid Data File into the working case memory. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0 and 35.1.0. ierr = gic_read_efield_grid(ftyp, fnam)

parameters.name: fnam
parameters.description: Efield grid data file name. (input; no default allowed).

ftyp.description: csv format, column order: latitude (deg), longitude (deg), Ee (V/km), En (V/km).
USGS json format [coordinates [lon, lat] in deg, Ex(=En) and Ey(=Ee) in mV/km.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
error opening Efield Grid data file.
error reading Efield Grid data file.
